capabilities.name: safe_register_node
capabilities.description: Safely register a trace node, suppressing any exception.

capabilities.name: safe_link
capabilities.description: Safely create a trace link, suppressing any exception.

capabilities.name: safe_find_node
capabilities.description: Safely find a trace node, suppressing any exception.

capabilities.name: safe_persist_matrix
capabilities.description: Safely persist a traceability matrix, suppressing any exception.

capabilities.name: safe_reset
capabilities.description: Safely reset the traceability service, suppressing any exception.

capabilities.name: TraceabilityServiceImpl
capabilities.description: Default implementation of ``TraceabilityService``.

methods.name: __init__
methods.doc: Initialize a new traceability service bound to a workspace.

methods.name: register_node
methods.doc: Register a new trace node.

methods.name: link
methods.doc: Create a directed link between two nodes.

methods.name: find_node
methods.doc: Find an already-registered node by external_id and kind.

methods.name: list_nodes
methods.doc: Return a shallow copy of all registered nodes.

methods.name: list_links
methods.doc: Return a shallow copy of all registered links.

methods.name: build_matrix
methods.doc: Assemble the current nodes and links into an immutable matrix.

methods.name: persist
methods.doc: Atomically persist the matrix to ``path`` as JSON.

methods.name: reset
methods.doc: Clear all accumulated nodes and links.

capabilities.name: TraceNode
capabilities.description: A single node in the traceability graph.

capabilities.name: TraceLink
capabilities.description: A directed edge between two TraceNode instances.

capabilities.name: TraceabilityMatrix
capabilities.description: A complete traceability matrix for a single PM iteration.

methods.name: query_by_kind
methods.doc: Return all nodes matching the given kind.

methods.name: query_ancestors
methods.doc: Return all upstream nodes for the given node_id using BFS.

methods.name: to_dict
methods.doc: Serialize the matrix to a plain dictionary.

capabilities.name: _now_epoch_ms
capabilities.description: Return the current time in milliseconds since the epoch.

capabilities.name: _uuid
capabilities.description: Generate a new UUID4 string.

capabilities.name: TraceabilityService
capabilities.description: Port interface for building, persisting, and querying traceability matrices.

methods.name: register_node
methods.doc: Register a new trace node.

methods.name: link
methods.doc: Create a directed link between two nodes.

methods.name: find_node
methods.doc: Find an already-registered node by external_id and kind.

methods.name: list_nodes
methods.doc: Return a shallow copy of all registered nodes.

methods.name: list_links
methods.doc: Return a shallow copy of all registered links.

methods.name: build_matrix
methods.doc: Assemble the current nodes and links into an immutable matrix.

methods.name: persist
methods.doc: Atomically persist the matrix to ``path`` as JSON.

methods.name: reset
methods.doc: Clear all accumulated nodes and links, preparing for a new iteration.

capabilities.name: create_traceability_service
capabilities.description: Factory that returns the concrete traceability service implementation.

capabilities.name: SessionSource
capabilities.description: Origin of a message or artifact within a Polaris session.

capabilities.name: SourceChain
capabilities.description: Immutable chain of session sources.

methods.name: root
methods.doc: Create a new chain containing exactly one source.

methods.name: last
methods.doc: Return the most recent source in the chain.

methods.name: to_list
methods.doc: Return a human-readable list of source names.

methods.name: append
methods.doc: Return a new chain with *source* appended to the end.

capabilities.name: SourceChainEncoder
capabilities.description: JSON encoder that serialises ``SourceChain`` and ``SessionSource``.

capabilities.name: TestSafeRegisterNode
capabilities.description: Tests for safe_register_node.

capabilities.name: TestSafeLink
capabilities.description: Tests for safe_link.

capabilities.name: TestSafePersistMatrix
capabilities.description: Tests for safe_persist_matrix.

capabilities.name: TestSafeReset
capabilities.description: Tests for safe_reset.

capabilities.name: TestSessionSource
capabilities.description: Tests for the SessionSource enum.

capabilities.name: TestSourceChain
capabilities.description: Tests for the immutable SourceChain.

capabilities.name: TestSourceChainEncoder
capabilities.description: Tests for JSON serialization of SourceChain objects.

capabilities.name: TestSourceChainSerialization
capabilities.description: Verify SourceChain serializes correctly via SourceChainEncoder.

methods.name: test_serialize_empty_chain
methods.doc: Empty SourceChain serializes to empty list.

methods.name: test_serialize_single_element_chain
methods.doc: Single-element SourceChain serializes to single-item list.

methods.name: test_serialize_multi_element_chain
methods.doc: Multi-element SourceChain serializes to list of values.

methods.name: test_serialize_session_source_directly
methods.doc: SessionSource enum serializes to its value.

methods.name: test_mixed_serialization
methods.doc: Mixed SourceChain and SessionSource serialize correctly.

methods.name: test_roundtrip_serialization
methods.doc: Serialization and deserialization preserves chain content.

methods.name: test_fallback_for_unknown_types
methods.doc: Unknown types raise TypeError for fallback.

capabilities.name: TestChainPropagation
capabilities.description: Verify chain propagation from USER_DIRECT through PM_DELEGATED to DIRECTOR_EXECUTED.

methods.name: test_user_direct_to_pm_delegated
methods.doc: Chain propagates from user to PM.

methods.name: test_full_super_mode_pipeline
methods.doc: Full SUPER-mode pipeline chain.

methods.name: test_chain_propagation_preserves_history
methods.doc: Each append preserves previous sources.

methods.name: test_chain_iteration_order
methods.doc: Iteration yields sources in order.

capabilities.name: TestSourceChainRoot
capabilities.description: Verify SourceChain.root() creates singleton chains correctly.

methods.name: test_root_creates_single_element
methods.doc: root() creates chain with exactly one element.

methods.name: test_root_every_source_type
methods.doc: root() works for all SessionSource variants.

methods.name: test_root_chains_are_equal
methods.doc: Two root() calls with same source create equal chains.

methods.name: test_root_chains_are_hashable
methods.doc: Root chains can be used as dict keys.

capabilities.name: TestSourceChainImmutability
capabilities.description: Verify SourceChain immutability: append() returns new chain, original unchanged.

methods.name: test_append_returns_new_chain
methods.doc: append() must not mutate the original chain.

methods.name: test_original_unchanged_after_multiple_appends
methods.doc: Original chain stays unchanged after multiple appends.

methods.name: test_multiple_chains_from_same_root
methods.doc: Multiple chains can be derived from same root without interference.

methods.name: test_append_returns_functional_value
methods.doc: append() return value can be used immediately.

methods.name: test_immutability_with_frozen_dataclass
methods.doc: SourceChain should behave as immutable (though not frozen).

capabilities.name: TestToListRepresentation
capabilities.description: Verify to_list() returns correct string representation.

methods.name: test_empty_chain_to_list
methods.doc: Empty chain to_list() returns empty list.

methods.name: test_single_element_to_list
methods.doc: Single element chain to_list() returns single-item list.

methods.name: test_multiple_elements_to_list
methods.doc: Multiple element chain to_list() returns all values as strings.

methods.name: test_to_list_matches_iteration
methods.doc: to_list() returns same order as iteration.

methods.name: test_to_list_usable_in_json
methods.doc: to_list() output is directly JSON-serializable.

capabilities.name: TestHashabilityAndEquality
capabilities.description: Verify SourceChain is hashable and comparable.

methods.name: test_equal_chains_are_equal
methods.doc: Two chains with same content are equal.

methods.name: test_unequal_chains_are_not_equal
methods.doc: Chains with different content are not equal.

methods.name: test_equal_chains_have_equal_hash
methods.doc: Equal chains have equal hash values.

methods.name: test_chain_as_dict_key
methods.doc: Chains can be used as dictionary keys.

methods.name: test_chain_not_equal_to_non_chain
methods.doc: Chain is not equal to non-chain types.

methods.name: test_chain_comparison_with_not_implemented
methods.doc: Chain comparison with incompatible type returns NotImplemented.

capabilities.name: TestLastMethod
capabilities.description: Verify last() method behavior.

methods.name: test_last_returns_last_element
methods.doc: last() returns the most recent source in the chain.

methods.name: test_last_on_single_element
methods.doc: last() on single element chain returns that element.

methods.name: test_last_on_empty_raises
methods.doc: last() on empty chain raises IndexError.

capabilities.name: TestEncoderEdgeCases
capabilities.description: Test SourceChainEncoder edge cases.

methods.name: test_encoder_handles_nested_dict
methods.doc: Encoder can handle nested structures.

methods.name: test_encoder_preserves_non_source_types
methods.doc: Encoder preserves non-SourceChain/Source types unchanged.

capabilities.name: TestRegisterNode
capabilities.description: Tests for node registration.

capabilities.name: TestLink
capabilities.description: Tests for link creation.

capabilities.name: TestBuildMatrix
capabilities.description: Tests for matrix assembly.

capabilities.name: TestMatrixQueries
capabilities.description: Tests for matrix query methods.

capabilities.name: TestPersistAndLoad
capabilities.description: Tests for atomic JSON persistence.

capabilities.name: TestReset
capabilities.description: Tests for reset behaviour.

capabilities.name: TestToDict
capabilities.description: Tests for dictionary serialization.

capabilities.name: service
capabilities.description: Return a fresh traceability service instance.
